name: Salsa
recipeIngredient: Lots of fresh cilantro from garden (or green coriander seeds)
recipeInstructions:
1. Chop the tomatoes into small pieces.
2. Add the chopped onions, halapenio peppers, and hot banana peppers to a bowl.
3. Mix in the fresh cilantro or green coriander seeds.
4. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
5. Serve over beans, rice, or on top of a baked pita for maximum flavor.
